# Basic diff test
#
# This script tests the mcpdiff tool's ability to compare MCP trace files
# and identify differences between them.

# First, create test files with known differences
-- file1.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "test",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"test\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- file2.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "test",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"test\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{\"status\":\"success\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- identical1.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "identical",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"identical\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{\"status\":\"identical\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- identical2.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "identical",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"method\":\"identical\",\"params\":{}}"
    }
  ],
  "responses": [
    {
      "id": "req1",
      "method": "",
      "content": "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"req1\",\"result\":{\"status\":\"identical\"}}"
    }
  ]
}

-- empty.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [],
  "responses": []
}

-- malformed.mcp --
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "requests": [],
  "responses":
}

# Test basic diff between two files with differences
mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp
stdout "Response differences:"
stdout "req1:"
! stderr "error"
# Exit code should be 1 to indicate differences were found
! stdout "No differences found"

# Test with identical files
mcpdiff identical1.mcp identical2.mcp
stdout "No differences found"
! stdout "Response differences:"
! stderr "error"
# Exit code should be 0 for identical files

# Test with the -ignore-order flag
mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp -ignore-order
stdout "Response differences:"
! stderr "error"

# Test with the -ignore-timestamps flag
mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp -ignore-timestamps
stdout "Response differences:"
! stderr "error"

# Test with --json output flag
mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp --json
stdout "{\"difference\":"
! stderr "error"

# Test comparing with empty file
mcpdiff file1.mcp empty.mcp
stdout "Response count mismatch"
! stderr "error"

# Test basic help
mcpdiff -h
stdout "Compare two MCP trace files"
! stderr "error"
